skills.name: stg-deploy-procedure
skills.description: Execute the closed STG deployment procedure without discretionary push-content stops.

skills.name: performance-verification
skills.description: Verify performance without mixing server, HTTP, browser, paint, real-user, cold-like, and warm samples.

skills.name: incident-response
skills.description: Record and analyze incidents with root cause, violated invariant, control change, regression test, and residual risk.

skills.name: control-change
skills.description: Modify the control platform without incident-specific if-statements or unconnected controls.

skills.name: evidence-reporting
skills.description: Produce reports that separate facts, evidence, judgments, and unknowns.
